subject: Re: Mercury Deployment Issue on AWS
body:
Hi Support Team,

Thanks for the quick response. I was able to resolve the issue. It turns out there was a permissions problem with the IAM role assigned to my deployment instance. After correcting the role, the deployment completed successfully.

Thanks for your help!
John

subject: Re: [opensuse] SUSE 10.3 + ATI FireGL 5250 + Latest ATI driver = no 3D efects
body: On 2/9/08, David C. Rankin wrote: > AV wrote: > > On Feb 9, 2008 9:24 AM, David C. Rankin > wrote: > > > >> Start by posting /etc/X11/xorg.conf, /var/log/Xorg.0.log, and the > >> output of: > >> > >> (1) glxinfo; run from a terminal; > >> (2) rpm -qa | grep fglrx; also run from a console > > > > Here it is all files. I am using KDE desktop. > > > > Audrius > > > > x11-video-fglrxG01-8.45.4-0.2 > ati-fglrxG01-kmp-default-8.45.4_2.6.22.16_0.1-0.2 > > Fine. > > Xorg.0.log: > > (**) Option "AIGLX" "on" > > > Good, indirect rendering is enabled, the rest is fine. > > xorg.conf: > > Fine. > > All in all your config looks fine. There doesn't appear to be anything > that would prevent compiz from loading. > > 3 Things: > > (1) Copy the following into a script and run it from the command line to > try and start compiz: > > #!/bin/bash > emerald --replace & > sleep 1 > LIBGL_ALWAYS_INDIRECT=1 compiz \\ > --ignore-desktop-hints \\ > --replace \\ > --indirect-rendering \\ > --no-libgl-fallback \\ > --sm-disable \\ > ccp & > > or just enter the following from a command line. Both commands are > "single" line commands but they get wrapped below. If it works, you can > modify your fusion-icon scripts to include the needed command line options. > > emerald --replace & > > LIBGL_ALWAYS_INDIRECT=1 compiz --ignore-desktop-hints --replace > --indirect-rendering --no-libgl-fallback --sm-disable ccp & > > [you can ignore the hundreds of messages that get dumped back to the > terminal if compiz starts. If it doesn't start and if there are only a > handful of error, they may be useful] No go. Same bluered screen. > > (2) if it doesn't, can you run fgl_glxgears from a terminal? I get same bluered screen that I have attached to my first e-mail. > > (3) if still having problems, make sure your compiz files are updated by > using yast->software management->actions->all packages->update if newer > package is available > > You will probably have to choose "ignore conflicts here" for the compiz > conflicts in the X11/XGL repository. > > Then run "rpm -qa | grep compiz" from a console and post the output. compiz-kde-0.7.0-5.1 compiz-emerald-0.6.9_git080208-1.1 compiz-fusion-plugins-main-0.6.9_git080208-1.1 libcompizconfig-0.6.9_git080208-1.1 compiz-gnome-0.7.0-5.1 compiz-fusion-plugins-extra-0.6.9_git080208-1.1 compiz-emerald-themes-0.6.0-1.1 compizconfig-settings-manager-0.6.9_git071204-4.4 python-compizconfig-0.6.9_git080208-1.1 compiz-manager-0.0.1_git080201-1.1 compiz-0.7.0-5.1 Audrius

YMMV. > > I started taking the acidophilus because IÃ¢â‚¬â„¢ve always been very prone to > yeast infections (even before the DS). I didnÃ¢â‚¬â„¢t realize that they were > helping with gas odor until I *ran out* and lived without them for about > a week! IÃ¢â‚¬â„¢ve never let *that* happen again! Lol I take them > religiously, twice a day. > > As far as recovery time, some people seem to experience a Ã¢â‚¬Å“turning the > cornerÃ¢â‚¬Â experience at 4-5 weeks post-op (for open surgery; lap recovery > time can be significantly less). It didnÃ¢â‚¬â„¢t work that way for me, > however. Until about week 6, I pretty much felt like IÃ¢â‚¬â„¢d been run over > by a truck. Then, very gradually, I began to feel more Ã¢â‚¬Å“like myselfÃ¢â‚¬Â. No food tasted > good. My surgeon assured me this would change, and it has. I love food > again. Bread, rice and noodles make me feel just sort of yucky and donÃ¢â‚¬â„¢t > appeal to me much. If I eat simple carbs with no fat/protein (like snow > cones or cotton candy), my tummy gets upset. Everything else is a go. > > For the first few months (maybe 6 months?) I felt like I couldnÃ¢â‚¬â„¢t eat > enough in one sitting. My meals were all one-course affairs because by > the time I was done the protein I needed, I was too stuffed to eat any > carbs! This makes the Granny Square the most sought out project among many crocheters. Join up the squares to make blankets of any size or simply use it individually as crochet coasters. You can also use them for making Crocheted Clothing Accessories and Home Decor accessories .Either way ,Crochet Granny Square blocks are fun to make. Today am sharing the pattern for Crochet Textured Granny Square Block. This pattern is started off in a circle worked in rounds and finished off in a Square Shape. The pattern is made with simple stitches and works up super quick. Ce n'est pas de ta faute
Tu n'es pas tout seul à devoir supporter cette situation

Je réagis maintenant

Tu lui as fait le coup de la panne et tu te sens humilié. C'est un sentiment normal. Sache que ce n'est pas de ta faute. C'est quelque chose qui arrive à de nombreux autres hommes tous les jours.

Pour le moment, ta partenaire ne t'en veut pas. Elle est patiente et attendra la prochaine fois pour avoir du plaisir avec toi. Mais attention, cela ne va pas durer et tu dois agir avant qu'il ne soit trop tard.

Parce que les femmes sont ainsi. Elles peuvent supporter la frustration si quelque chose de meilleur arrive ensuite. Et le meilleur, c'est d'en avoir une plus ferme, une plus grosse et plus longtemps la prochaine fois...

Si tu ne réunis pas ces trois conditions de base, tu ne lui donneras pas le plaisir qu'elle attend et d'ailleurs toi non plus, tu n'auras pas de plaisir. Tu dois réagir maintenant pour être prêt la prochaine fois !
Je réagis maintenant

subject: Concern about Medical Data Encryption Malfunction Overnight
body:
Dear Support Team,

I am reaching out to address the problem with our medical data encryption system that occurred last night. We are currently unable to pinpoint the reason for the failure. We believe it could be related to a software update conflict or missing configuration files.

To date, we have attempted to restart the servers, reviewed the settings, and utilized diagnostic tools, but the issue remains unresolved. We would be extremely grateful if you could help us in resolving this situation as quickly as possible.

The malfunction of the encryption system has critical impacts on our operations, and we need to restore its functionality promptly. Could you kindly advise on additional steps for troubleshooting and the data you require to assist with the resolution?

We appreciate your timely response to this matter and look forward to your prompt communication. Thank you for your assistance.

subject: Ripple Rewards XRP Holders: Find Out How
body:
View this email in your browser

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

In an unexpected chain of occurrences, Ripple has ultimately resolved its significant judicial conflict with the SEC, marking a substantial victory for both Ripple and the broader digital currency community. This defining success establishes established channels for technological advancement and paves the way toward a more supportive regulatory environment.

To mark this historic moment, Ripple is recognizing dedicated XRP holders with an limited allocation of RLUSD, Ripple’s innovative stablecoin anchored to the dollar. RLUSD, already live on the XRP blockchain, is designed to meet corporate demands, enabling fast, low-cost, and fully compliant worldwide remittances and trading. With RLUSD trading volumes exceeding half a billion dollars in second quarter only, this exclusive distribution highlights Ripple’s unwavering support to its community and innovation. Approved participants can now claim RLUSD equivalent to 17% of XRP assets, though the pool is limited to just 5,000,000 RLUSD tokens.

However, the celebration doesn’t end there. Ripple has further surprised the financial sector by finalizing the Hidden Road deal, a global trading intermediary, for $1.25B. This landmark acquisition puts Ripple at the crossroads of crypto markets and legacy financial infrastructure, unlocking unprecedented opportunities for professional investment sector to embrace blockchain-based assets with effortless integration and market liquidity.

In addition to this substantial investment, Ripple’s platform within XRPL continues to accelerate growth with the launch of several worldwide fiat-supported digital currencies, including USDC, XS

subject: Upgrade Payment Gateway for Secure Patient Data and HIPAA Compliance
body: Greetings Customer Support, I am reaching out to request an upgrade to our payment gateway to ensure the secure processing of patient data and adherence to HIPAA regulations. Our current payment solution is outdated and fails to meet the necessary security standards. I would like to request the installation of a new payment gateway that is HIPAA compliant and employs the most advanced security measures to safeguard sensitive patient information. This upgrade is essential for preserving patient trust and preventing any potential data breaches. Could you please provide guidance on the steps required for this upgrade and any additional information needed from my end? I appreciate your swift response to this request and anticipate your early reply.
